subject: Snivy, a small green serpentine creature with a leaf-tipped tail and leafy collar, posed in a lush sun-dappled green environment
description: Snivy is centered in a vibrant green scene, its slender snake-like body coiled slightly with its tail leaf fanned out behind it. The creature has a small bipedal-leaning upright posture with short arms, a creamy underside, and distinctive leaf-shaped protrusions at its neck. The surrounding environment is dense with green foliage, shafts of light filtering through leaves creating bright dappled highlights. The palette is overwhelmingly warm and saturated green with yellow highlights — a sunlit forest clearing. The mood is calm and content, matching the intelligence and composure described in the flavor text.
foreground: Snivy in a relaxed coiled pose amid bright green foliage
background: lush dense forest canopy, sunlit foliage, dappled light
